personality: Alert, taciturn, sharp-eyed. Speaks in terse observations from long hours scanning the horizon.

greetingPool.text: Nothing moves on the road without my knowing. State your purpose.
I've watched from this tower since dawn. The road is clear, for now.
Sharp eyes keep folk safe. If you've seen anything amiss, tell me now.

idlePool.text: Smoke rising from the eastern wood again. Could be charcoal burners. Could be trouble.
My eyes are the first line of defence. By the time the guards draw steel, I have already seen it coming.
